```
+import type { TabItem, TabsRendererProps } from '@shiro/rich-editor'
+import { createRendererDecoration } from '@shiro/rich-editor'
+import type {
+  EditorConfig,
+  LexicalEditor,
+  LexicalNode,
+  NodeKey,
+  SerializedLexicalNode,
+  Spread,
+} from 'lexical'
+import { DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
+import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
+
+import { TabsRenderer } from '../TabsRenderer'
+
+export type { TabItem }
+
+export type SerializedTabsNode = Spread<
+  {
+    tabs: TabItem[]
+  },
+  SerializedLexicalNode
+>
+
+export class TabsNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
+  __tabs: TabItem[]
+
+  static getType(): string {
+    return 'tabs'
+  }
+
+  static clone(node: TabsNode): TabsNode {
+    return new TabsNode(
+      node.__tabs.map((t) => ({ ...t })),
+      node.__key,
+    )
+  }
+
+  constructor(tabs: TabItem[], key?: NodeKey) {
+    super(key)
+    this.__tabs = tabs
+  }
+
+  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
+    const div = document.createElement('div')
+    div.className = 'rich-tabs-wrapper'
+    return div
+  }
+
+  updateDOM(): boolean {
+    return false
+  }
+
+  isInline(): boolean {
+    return false
+  }
+
+  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedTabsNode): TabsNode {
+    return $createTabsNode(serializedNode.tabs)
+  }
+
+  exportJSON(): SerializedTabsNode {
+    return {
+      ...super.exportJSON(),
+      type: 'tabs',
+      tabs: this.__tabs,
+      version: 1,
+    }
+  }
+
+  getTabs(): TabItem[] {
+    return this.getLatest().__tabs
+  }
+
+  setTabs(tabs: TabItem[]): void {
+    const writable = this.getWritable()
+    writable.__tabs = tabs
+  }
+
+  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
+    return createRendererDecoration('Tabs', TabsRenderer, {
+      tabs: this.__tabs,
+    } as TabsRendererProps)
+  }
+}
+
+export function $createTabsNode(tabs: TabItem[]): TabsNode {
+  return new TabsNode(tabs)
+}
+
+export function $isTabsNode(
+  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
+): node is TabsNode {
+  return node instanceof TabsNode
+}
```
</details></tool-use>

```
+import type { SlashMenuItemConfig } from '@shiro/rich-editor'
+import type { EditorConfig, LexicalEditor, LexicalNode } from 'lexical'
+import { $insertNodes } from 'lexical'
+import { PanelTop } from 'lucide-react'
+import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
+import { createElement } from 'react'
+
+import { type SerializedTabsNode,TabsNode } from './TabsNode'
+
+export class TabsEditNode extends TabsNode {
+  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
+    {
+      title: 'Tabs',
+      icon: createElement(PanelTop, { size: 20 }),
+      description: 'Tabbed content panels',
+      keywords: ['tabs', 'panel', 'switch'],
+      section: 'ADVANCED',
+      onSelect: (editor) => {
+        editor.update(() => {
+          const emptyState = editor.parseEditorState(
+            '{"root":{"children":[{"children":[],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}',
+          )
+          $insertNodes([
+            $createTabsEditNode([
+              { label: 'Tab 1', content: emptyState.toJSON() },
+              { label: 'Tab 2', content: emptyState.toJSON() },
+            ]),
+          ])
+        })
+      },
+    },
+  ]
+
+  static clone(node: TabsEditNode): TabsEditNode {
+    return new TabsEditNode(
+      node.__tabs.map((t) => ({ ...t })),
+      node.__key,
+    )
+  }
+
+  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedTabsNode): TabsEditNode {
+    return new TabsEditNode(serializedNode.tabs)
+  }
+
+  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
+    return super.decorate(_editor, _config)
+  }
+}
+
+export function $createTabsEditNode(
+  tabs: import('./TabsNode').TabItem[],
+): TabsEditNode {
+  return new TabsEditNode(tabs)
+}
+
+export function $isTabsEditNode(
+  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
+): node is TabsEditNode {
+  return node instanceof TabsEditNode
+}
```

```
+import type { TabsRendererProps } from '@shiro/rich-editor'
+import { RichRenderer, useColorScheme, useRendererConfig } from '@shiro/rich-editor'
+import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'
+
+export type { TabsRendererProps }
+
+export function TabsRenderer({ tabs }: TabsRendererProps) {
+  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState(tabs[0]?.label ?? '')
+  const colorScheme = useColorScheme()
+  const rendererConfig = useRendererConfig()
+
+  const tabRefs = useRef<Map<string, HTMLButtonElement>>(new Map())
+  const listRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
+  const [indicator, setIndicator] = useState({ left: 0, width: 0 })
+
+  const updateIndicator = useCallback(() => {
+    const el = tabRefs.current.get(activeTab)
+    const list = listRef.current
+    if (el && list) {
+      const listRect = list.getBoundingClientRect()
+      const tabRect = el.getBoundingClientRect()
+      setIndicator({
+        left: tabRect.left - listRect.left,
+        width: tabRect.width,
+      })
+    }
+  }, [activeTab])
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    updateIndicator()
+  }, [updateIndicator])
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    if (tabs.length === 0) return
+    if (tabs.some((tab) => tab.label === activeTab)) return
+    setActiveTab(tabs[0]?.label ?? '')
+  }, [activeTab, tabs])
+
+  if (tabs.length === 0) return null
+
+  return (
+    <div className="rich-tabs">
+      <div className="rich-tabs-list-wrapper">
+        <div className="rich-tabs-list" ref={listRef}>
+          {tabs.map((tab) => (
+            <button
+              key={tab.label}
+              type="button"
+              className="rich-tabs-trigger"
+              data-selected={tab.label === activeTab ? '' : undefined}
+              onClick={() => setActiveTab(tab.label)}
+              ref={(el: HTMLButtonElement | null) => {
+                if (el) tabRefs.current.set(tab.label, el)
+                else tabRefs.current.delete(tab.label)
+              }}
+            >
+              {tab.label}
+            </button>
+          ))}
+
+          <div
+            className="rich-tabs-indicator"
+            style={{ left: indicator.left, width: indicator.width }}
+            aria-hidden
+          />
+        </div>
+
+        <div className="rich-tabs-separator" />
+      </div>
+
+      <div className="rich-tabs-content-wrapper">
+        {tabs.map((tab) => (
+          <div
+            key={tab.label}
+            className="rich-tabs-content"
+            hidden={tab.label !== activeTab}
+          >
+            {tab.label === activeTab && (
+              <RichRenderer
+                value={tab.content}
+                theme={colorScheme}
+                rendererConfig={rendererConfig}
+              />
+            )}
+          </div>
+        ))}
+      </div>
+    </div>
+  )
+}
```
</details></tool-use>

```
+import { Tabs } from '@base-ui/react/tabs'
+import type { TabItem } from '@shiro/rich-editor'
+import { RichRenderer, useColorScheme, useRendererConfig } from '@shiro/rich-editor'
+import {
+  useCallback,
+  useEffect,
+  useLayoutEffect,
+  useRef,
+  useState,
+} from 'react'
+
+export interface TabsEditRendererProps {
+  tabs: TabItem[]
+}
+
+export function TabsEditRenderer({ tabs }: TabsEditRendererProps) {
+  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState(tabs[0]?.label ?? '')
+  const colorScheme = useColorScheme()
+  const rendererConfig = useRendererConfig()
+
+  const tabRefs = useRef<Map<string, HTMLButtonElement>>(new Map())
+  const listRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
+  const contentWrapperRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
+  const prevHeightRef = useRef(0)
+  const [indicator, setIndicator] = useState({ left: 0, width: 0 })
+
+  const updateIndicator = useCallback(() => {
+    const el = tabRefs.current.get(activeTab)
+    const list = listRef.current
+    if (el && list) {
+      const listRect = list.getBoundingClientRect()
+      const tabRect = el.getBoundingClientRect()
+      setIndicator({
+        left: tabRect.left - listRect.left,
+        width: tabRect.width,
+      })
+    }
+  }, [activeTab])
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    updateIndicator()
+  }, [updateIndicator])
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    const list = listRef.current
+    if (!list) return
+    const observer = new ResizeObserver(() => updateIndicator())
+    observer.observe(list)
+    return () => observer.disconnect()
+  }, [updateIndicator])
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    if (tabs.length === 0) return
+    if (tabs.some((tab) => tab.label === activeTab)) return
+    setActiveTab(tabs[0]?.label ?? '')
+  }, [activeTab, tabs])
+
+  const handleValueChange = useCallback((value: string) => {
+    if (contentWrapperRef.current) {
+      prevHeightRef.current = contentWrapperRef.current.offsetHeight
+    }
+    setActiveTab(value)
+  }, [])
+
+  useLayoutEffect(() => {
+    const wrapper = contentWrapperRef.current
+    const prevHeight = prevHeightRef.current
+    if (!wrapper || !prevHeight) return
+
+    const newHeight = wrapper.scrollHeight
+    if (prevHeight === newHeight) {
+      prevHeightRef.current = 0
+      return
+    }
+
+    wrapper.style.height = `${prevHeight}px`
+    void wrapper.offsetHeight
+    wrapper.style.height = `${newHeight}px`
+
+    const reset = () => {
+      wrapper.style.height = ''
+      prevHeightRef.current = 0
+    }
+    wrapper.addEventListener('transitionend', reset, { once: true })
+    return () => wrapper.removeEventListener('transitionend', reset)
+  }, [activeTab])
+
+  if (tabs.length === 0) return null
+
+  return (
+    <Tabs.Root
+      className="rich-tabs"
+      value={activeTab}
+      onValueChange={handleValueChange}
+    >
+      <div className="rich-tabs-list-wrapper">
+        <Tabs.List className="rich-tabs-list" ref={listRef}>
+          {tabs.map((tab) => (
+            <Tabs.Tab
+              key={tab.label}
+              value={tab.label}
+              className="rich-tabs-trigger"
+              ref={(el: HTMLButtonElement | null) => {
+                if (el) tabRefs.current.set(tab.label, el)
+                else tabRefs.current.delete(tab.label)
+              }}
+            >
+              {tab.label}
+            </Tabs.Tab>
+          ))}
+
+          <div
+            className="rich-tabs-indicator"
+            style={{ left: indicator.left, width: indicator.width }}
+            aria-hidden
+          />
+        </Tabs.List>
+
+
```

```
+import { resolve } from 'node:path'
+
+import { defineConfig } from 'vite'
+import dts from 'vite-plugin-dts'
+
+export default defineConfig({
+  plugins: [
+    dts({
+      entryRoot: 'src',
+      outDir: 'dist',
+      tsconfigPath: './tsconfig.json',
+    }),
+  ],
+  build: {
+    lib: {
+      entry: resolve(__dirname, 'src/index.ts'),
+      formats: ['es'],
+      fileName: () => 'index.mjs',
+    },
+    rollupOptions: {
+      external: (id: string) =>
+        [
+          'react',
+          'react-dom',
+          'react/jsx-runtime',
+          '@shiro/rich-editor',
+          'lexical',
+        ].includes(id) ||
+        id.startsWith('@lexical/') ||
+        id.startsWith('@base-ui/') ||
+        id.startsWith('lucide-react'),
+      output: { preserveModules: false },
+    },
+    cssCodeSplit: false,
+    minify: false,
+    target: 'es2020',
+  },
+})
```

```
import type { ComponentType, ReactElement } from 'react'
import { createElement } from 'react'

import { useRendererConfig } from '../context/RendererConfigContext'
import type { RendererConfig } from '../types/renderer-config'

export type RendererKey = keyof RendererConfig

type RendererPropsByKey = {
  [K in RendererKey]-?: NonNullable<RendererConfig[K]> extends ComponentType<
    infer P extends object
  >
    ? P
    : never
}

type RendererComponentByKey = {
  [K in RendererKey]-?: NonNullable<
    RendererConfig[K]
  > extends ComponentType<any>
    ? NonNullable<RendererConfig[K]>
    : never
}

export type RendererWrapperProps = {
  [K in RendererKey]-?: {
    /** Name of the renderer in RendererConfig */
    rendererKey: K
    /** Default renderer component */
    defaultRenderer: RendererComponentByKey[K]
    /** Props to pass to the renderer */
    props: RendererPropsByKey[K]
  }
}[RendererKey]

/**
 * Wrapper component that allows overriding default renderers with custom ones.
 * Uses RendererConfig from context to determine which renderer to use.
 */
export function RendererWrapper({
  rendererKey,
  defaultRenderer: DefaultRenderer,
  props,
}: RendererWrapperProps) {
  const config = useRendererConfig()
  const Renderer: ComponentType<any> = config?.[rendererKey] ?? DefaultRenderer

  return <Renderer {...props} />
}

/**
 * Type-safe helper for creating RendererWrapper elements from .ts node files.
 * Avoids the createElement + discriminated-union typing limitation.
 */
export function createRendererDecoration<K extends RendererKey>(
  rendererKey: K,
  defaultRenderer: RendererComponentByKey[K],
  props: RendererPropsByKey[K],
): ReactElement {
  return createElement(RendererWrapper, {
    rendererKey,
    defaultRenderer,
    props,
  } as RendererWrapperProps)
}
```
</details></tool-use>

```
   111	    }
   112	  } catch {
   113	    // start with empty canvas
   114	  }
   115	
   116	  return (
   117	    <div ref={containerRef} className={css.tldrawEditorContainer}>
   118	      <TldrawComponent
   119	        snapshot={snapshotProp}
   120	        onMount={(editor: any) => {
   121	          editor.store.listen(() => handleChange(editor), {
   122	            scope: 'document',
   123	          })
   124	        }}
   125	      />
   126	    </div>
   127	  )
   128	}
```

```
     6	  TableCellResizerPlugin,

     8	} from '@shiro/rich-plugin-table'
     9	import {
    10	  embedEditNodes,
    11	  EmbedPlugin,
    12	  enhancedEditRendererConfig,
    13	  tabsEditNodes,
    14	  TldrawNode,
    15	  TldrawPlugin,
    16	} from '@shiro/rich-renderers'
    17	import type { Klass, LexicalNode } from 'lexical'
    18	import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
    19	import { useMemo } from 'react'
    20	
    21	const defaultExtraNodes = [TldrawNode, ...embedEditNodes, ...tabsEditNodes]
    22	
    23	export interface ShiroEditorProps extends Omit<
    24	  RichEditorProps,
    25	  'rendererConfig' | 'extraNodes' | 'actions'
    26	> {
    27	  extraNodes?: Array<Klass<LexicalNode>>
    28	  actions?: ReactNode
    29	  selfHostnames?: string[]
    30	}
    31	
    32	export function ShiroEditor({
    33	  extraNodes,
    34	  actions,
    35	  children,
    36	  selfHostnames,
    37	  ...props
    38	}: ShiroEditorProps) {
    39	  const mergedNodes = useMemo(
    40	    () =>
    41	      extraNodes ? [...defaultExtraNodes, ...extraNodes] : defaultExtraNodes,
    42	    [extraNodes],
    43	  )
    44	
    45	  return (
    46	    <RichEditor
    47	      {...props}
    48	      extraNodes={mergedNodes}
    49	      rendererConfig={enhancedEditRendererConfig}
    50	      actions={
    51	        <>
    52	          <SlashMenuPlugin />
    53	          {actions}
    54	        </>
    55	      }
    56	    >
    57	      <FloatingToolbarPlugin />
    58	      <TldrawPlugin />
    59	      <EmbedPlugin selfHostnames={selfHostnames} />
    60	      <TableRowColumnHandlesPlugin />
    61	      <TableCellResizerPlugin />
    62	      {children}
    63	    </RichEditor>
    64	  )
    65	}
```

```
     1	import type { TabsRendererProps } from '@shiro/rich-editor'

     8	
     9	export type { TabsRendererProps }
    10	
    11	export function TabsRenderer({ tabs }: TabsRendererProps) {
    12	  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState(tabs[0]?.label ?? '')
    13	  const colorScheme = useColorScheme()
    14	  const rendererConfig = useRendererConfig()
    15	
    16	  const tabRefs = useRef<Map<string, HTMLButtonElement>>(new Map())
    17	  const listRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
    18	  const [indicator, setIndicator] = useState({ left: 0, width: 0 })
    19	
    20	  const updateIndicator = useCallback(() => {
    21	    const el = tabRefs.current.get(activeTab)
    22	    const list = listRef.current
    23	    if (el && list) {
    24	      const listRect = list.getBoundingClientRect()
    25	      const tabRect = el.getBoundingClientRect()
    26	      setIndicator({
    27	        left: tabRect.left - listRect.left,
    28	        width: tabRect.width,
    29	      })
    30	    }
    31	  }, [activeTab])
    32	
    33	  useEffect(() => {
    34	    updateIndicator()
    35	  }, [updateIndicator])
    36	
    37	  useEffect(() => {
    38	    if (tabs.length === 0) return
    39	    if (tabs.some((tab) => tab.label === activeTab)) return
    40	    setActiveTab(tabs[0]?.label ?? '')
    41	  }, [activeTab, tabs])
    42	
    43	  if (tabs.length === 0) return null
    44	
    45	  return (
    46	    <div className="rich-tabs">
    47	      <div className="rich-tabs-list-wrapper">
    48	        <div className="rich-tabs-list" ref={listRef}>
    49	          {tabs.map((tab) => (
    50	            <button
    51	              key={tab.label}
    52	              type="button"
    53	              className="rich-tabs-trigger"
    54	              data-selected={tab.label === activeTab ? '' : undefined}
    55	              onClick={() => setActiveTab(tab.label)}
    56	              ref={(el: HTMLButtonElement | null) => {
    57	                if (el) tabRefs.current.set(tab.label, el)
    58	                else tabRefs.current.delete(tab.label)
    59	              }}
    60	            >
    61	              {tab.label}
    62	            </button>
    63	          ))}
    64	
    65	          <div
    66	            className="rich-tabs-indicator"
    67	            style={{ left: indicator.left, width: indicator.width }}
    68	            aria-hidden
    69	          />
    70	        </div>
    71	
    72	        <div className="rich-tabs-separator" />
    73	      </div>
    74	
    75	      <div className="rich-tabs-content-wrapper">
    76	        {tabs.map((tab) => (
    77	          <div
    78	            key={tab.label}
    79	            className="rich-tabs-content"
    80	            hidden={tab.label !== activeTab}
    81	          >
    82	            {tab.label === activeTab && (
    83	              <RichRenderer
    84	                value={tab.content}
    85	                theme={colorScheme}
    86	                rendererConfig={rendererConfig}
    87	              />
    88	            )}
    89	          </div>
    90	        ))}
    91	      </div>
    92	    </div>
    93	  )
    94	}
```

```
    33	export function EmbedLinkRenderer({

    43	    setEditUrl(url)
    44	  }, [url])
    45	
    46	  useEffect(() => {
    47	    if (!url) {

    52	  const commitUrl = useCallback(() => {
    53	    const trimmed = editUrl.trim()
    54	    if (!trimmed) return
    55	    editor.update(() => {
    56	      const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey)
    57	      if (!node || !('setUrl' in node)) return
    58	      const n = node as unknown as EmbedNodeMethods
    59	      const currentUrl = n.getUrl?.()
    60	      if (currentUrl !== trimmed) {
    61	        n.setUrl(trimmed)

    65	          n.setSource(matchEmbedUrl(new URL(trimmed)))

    68	        }
    69	      }
    70	    })

    73	  const handleKeyDown = useCallback(

    76	        e.preventDefault()
    77	        commitUrl()
    78	        inputRef.current?.blur()
    79	      } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
    80	        e.preventDefault()
    81	        setEditUrl(url)
    82	        inputRef.current?.blur()
    83	      }
    84	    },
    85	    [commitUrl, url],
    86	  )
    87	
    88	  const handleDelete = useCallback(() => {
    89	    editor.update(() => {
    90	      const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey)
    91	      if (node) node.remove()
    92	    })
    93	  }, [editor, nodeKey])
    94	
    95	  const handleOpen = useCallback(() => {
    96	    if (url) window.open(url, '_blank', 'noopener,noreferrer')
    97	  }, [url])
    98	
    99	  const label = type ? typeLabels[type] : 'Embed'
   100	  const cssModifier = type || 'generic'

   102	  return (

   104	      <span className="rich-embed__badge">

   106	        {label}
   107	      </span>

   110	        ref={inputRef}
   111	        className="rich-embed__input"
   112	        type="url"
   113	        value={editUrl}
   114	        onChange={(e) => setEditUrl(e.target.value)}
   115	        onBlur={commitUrl}
   116	        onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
   117	        placeholder="https://..."
   118	      />
   119	      <span className="rich-embed__actions">
   120	        <button
   121	          type="button"
   122	          className="rich-embed__action-btn"
   123	          onClick={handleOpen}
   124	          title="Open in new tab"
   125	          disabled={!url}

   134	        >
   135	          <Trash2 />
   136	        </button>
   137	      </span>
   138	    </div>
   139	  )
   140	}
```

_**Agent (gpt-5.3-codex 2026-02-16 16:56:11Z)**_

**Findings**
1. High: `@shiro/rich-ext-tabs` is missing package-level build wiring, so it cannot be built directly and its `publishConfig` points at `dist` artifacts that may not be produced.  
`packages/rich-ext-tabs/package.json:1` (no `scripts.build`, no `files` like other ext/renderer packages).  
I confirmed with `pnpm -C packages/rich-ext-tabs run build` -> `ERR_PNPM_NO_SCRIPT Missing script: build`.

2. Low: `TabItem` is exported from the tabs subpath but not from the top-level `@shiro/rich-renderers` export surface.  
`packages/rich-renderers/src/index.ts:112` (tabs types exported without `TabItem`) vs `packages/rich-renderers/src/tabs.ts:1` (includes `TabItem`).  
If consumers import tabs API from top-level only, this is a missing export.

**What looked correct**
1. Tabs extraction wiring is mostly correct:
- `TabsNode` removed from core editor defaults: `packages/rich-editor/src/config.ts:41`, `packages/rich-editor/src/config-edit.ts:22`.
- Node/renderer moved to ext package and exported: `packages/rich-ext-tabs/src/index.ts:1`.
- Core editor now exposes the needed shared APIs/types (`createRendererDecoration`, `useRendererConfig`, `TabItem`, `TabsRendererProps`): `packages/rich-editor/src/index.ts:15`.

2. Embed rename looks complete:
- `@shiro/rich-renderer-embed` -> `@shiro/rich-ext-embed` updated in renderer package deps/exports/imports: `packages/rich-renderers/package.json:33`, `packages/rich-renderers/src/embed.ts:1`, `packages/rich-renderers/src/index.ts:82`.
- Repo-wide search found no remaining `@shiro/rich-renderer-embed` imports.

3. `rich-renderers` and `rich-editor-shiro` wiring is in place:
- Tabs renderer/editor config added: `packages/rich-renderers/src/config.ts:19`, `packages/rich-renderers/src/config-edit.ts:13`.
- Tabs nodes added to Shiro defaults: `packages/rich-editor-shiro/src/ShiroEditor.tsx:21`, `packages/rich-editor-shiro/src/ShiroRenderer.tsx:12`.

**Note**
The working tree appears clean now; findings above are based on the diff snapshot I inspected during review. If you want, I can re-run against a specific commit range to lock this to exact SHAs.
